You are an execution planner. Given available tools, models, and a user task, create a step-by-step plan.
Step types: TOOL, EXTRACT, RECALL, MODEL, CHECK, STORE, DONE
Use {from_N} to reference output of step N.
If info is missing: #ASK|question=what you need to know

<|plan|>
TOOLS: outlook.list_emails(folder?,filter?), outlook.read_email(message_id*), outlook.reply_email(message_id*,body*), teams.send_message(to*,message*)
MODELS: default|chat
USER: Revisa los correos del cliente Iberdrola de esta semana y prepara un resumen para el equipo de ventas en Teams

You are an execution planner. Given available tools, models, and a user task, create a step-by-step plan.
Step types: TOOL, EXTRACT, RECALL, MODEL, CHECK, STORE, DONE
Use {from_N} to reference output of step N.
If info is missing: #ASK|question=what you need to know

<|plan|>
TOOLS: aws.describe_instances(region?,filters?), aws.get_cloudwatch_metric(metric*,instance_id*,period?), outlook.send_email(to*,subject*,body*)
MODELS: default|chat
USER: Check CPU and memory usage across all prod EC2 instances and email me a report if anything is over 80%

1. TOOL aws.describe_instances|filters=tag:env=production
2. TOOL aws.get_cloudwatch_metric|metric=CPUUtilization|instance_id={from_1.each}|period=1h
3. TOOL aws.get_cloudwatch_metric|metric=MemoryUtilization|instance_id={from_1.each}|period=1h
4. CHECK {from_2}|expect=all instances below 80% CPU
5. CHECK {from_3}|expect=all instances below 80% memory
6. MODEL default|task=generate health report highlighting instances over 80% threshold|context={from_1},{from_2},{from_3}
7. TOOL outlook.send_email|to=me|subject=Prod EC2 Health Report|body={from_6}
8. DONE

You are an execution planner. Given available tools, models, and a user task, create a step-by-step plan.

<|plan|>
TOOLS: grafana.query(metric*,period?), grafana.get_dashboard(dashboard_id*), outlook.send_email(to*,subject*,body*), slack.send_message(channel*,message*)
MODELS: default|chat
USER: Проверь метрики производительности за последние 24 часа, сравни с SLA и отправь отчёт руководителю отдела

1. TOOL grafana.query|metric=response_time_p95|period=24h
2. TOOL grafana.query|metric=uptime_percentage|period=24h
3. TOOL grafana.query|metric=error_rate_5xx|period=24h
4. RECALL SLA thresholds for production services
5. MODEL default|task=compare metrics against SLA thresholds and highlight violations|context={from_1},{from_2},{from_3},{from_4}
6. CHECK {from_5}|expect=clear comparison with pass/fail per metric
7. TOOL outlook.send_email|to=department-head|subject=Отчёт о производительности за 24ч|body={from_5}
8. DONE

<|plan|>
TOOLS: k8s.get_pods(namespace*), k8s.get_logs(pod*,lines?), grafana.query(metric*,period?), slack.send_message(channel*,message*)
MODELS: default|chat
USER: Проверь состояние продакшена, собери метрики за последний час и отправь отчёт в канал дежурных

1. TOOL k8s.get_pods|namespace=production
2. CHECK {from_1}|expect=all pods Running
3. TOOL grafana.query|metric=error_rate_5xx|period=1h
4. TOOL grafana.query|metric=cpu_usage|period=1h
5. TOOL grafana.query|metric=memory_usage|period=1h
6. MODEL default|task=compile production health report from pods and metrics|context={from_1},{from_3},{from_4},{from_5}
7. TOOL slack.send_message|channel=#oncall|message={from_6}
8. DONE

<|plan|>
TOOLS: jira.list_issues(project*,status?), jira.update_issue(issue_id*,status?,comment?), teams.send_message(to*,message*)
MODELS: default|chat
USER: Revisa los tickets abiertos del proyecto GAMMA en Jira, cierra los que ya están resueltos y avisa al equipo por Teams

1. TOOL jira.list_issues|project=GAMMA|status=resolved
2. CHECK {from_1}|expect=list of resolved issues ready to close
3. TOOL jira.update_issue|issue_id={from_1.each}|status=closed|comment=Verified and closed
4. MODEL default|task=summarize closed tickets for team notification|context={from_1}
5. TOOL teams.send_message|to=#gamma-team|message={from_4}
6. STORE project|fact=Closed {from_1.count} resolved tickets in GAMMA
7. DONE

<|plan|>
TOOLS: k8s.get_pods(namespace*), k8s.get_logs(pod*,lines?), grafana.query(metric*,period?), pagerduty.create_incident(title*,service*,urgency*), slack.send_message(channel*,message*)
MODELS: default|chat, code-gen|code
USER: Проверь состояние продакшена — поды, логи ошибок и метрики за последний час. Если есть проблемы, создай инцидент в PagerDuty и сообщи команде в Slack

1. TOOL k8s.get_pods|namespace=production
2. CHECK {from_1}|expect=all pods Running
3. TOOL k8s.get_logs|pod={from_1.unhealthy}|lines=300
4. TOOL grafana.query|metric=error_rate_5xx|period=1h
5. TOOL grafana.query|metric=cpu_usage|period=1h
6. TOOL grafana.query|metric=memory_usage|period=1h
7. MODEL code-gen|task=analyze logs and metrics for anomalies and incidents|context={from_1},{from_3},{from_4},{from_5},{from_6}
8. CHECK {from_7}|expect=assessment of production health
9. TOOL pagerduty.create_incident|title=Production issue: {from_7.summary}|service=backend|urgency={from_7.severity}
10. TOOL slack.send_message|channel=#ops-incidents|message={from_7}
11. DONE
